final:
module max_value(
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    output reg [7:0] MAX
);

    always @(*) begin
        MAX = (A >= B) ? A : B;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (A < B) begin
        MAX <= A;
      end else begin
        MAX <= B;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
